hero.title: Protocol, diplomacy, certification and institutional communication for the modern professional world.
hero.subtitle: World Protocol Academy is an independent digital academy and professional platform for protocol, diplomacy, public communication, security-aware readiness, certification and AI-assisted learning.

programmes.label: Programmes
programmes.title: Structured professional learning pathways.
programmes.text: WPA programmes are organized by levels, programme families, assessment logic and professional pathways.

certification.title: Professional non-degree certification.

institute.text: The Institute gives WPA academic gravity, methodological discipline and a public research framework.
